Data visualization without a charting library

SVG + design tokens keeps exemplars portable (open the HTML file anywhere). For production dashboards, prefer accessible chart primitives (canvas/SVG with ARIA) and never rely on color alone — supplement with values, patterns, or labels as shown below.

Midnight band callout

Charts inherit tone from their parent surface.

On inverse-surface, invert strokes to inverse-foreground mixes and keep gridlines at low opacity. The KPI pattern above still uses section fills inside cards so values stay legible if you embed the strip in a dark hero.

Static HTML · Movemental tokens
